title: Well-Known Labels, Annotations and Taints — node.kubernetes.io/memory-pressure
text:
Type: Taint
Example:
node.kubernetes.io/memory-pressure: "NoSchedule"
Used on: Node
The kubelet detects memory pressure based on
memory.available
and
allocatableMemory.available
observed on a Node. The observed values are then compared to the corresponding thresholds that can
be set on the kubelet to determine if the Node condition and taint should be added/removed.
